question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Pamandzi will be higher on each resolution date listed below than on 2026-01-04?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.67005.D once the data is published.

The exact value on 2026-01-04 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2025-12-25) was 28.313. (The daily average temperature at the French weather station at Pamandzi.)
background: The history of Average temperature by day and by station for France - Degree Celsius - PAMANDZI - Daily from Météo-France is available at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.67005.D.
